stories.title: Sources: Nelson promoted to 76ers' No. 2 exec
stories.summary: The 76ers are promoting assistant general manager Jameer Nelson to the team's executive vice president of basketball operations under new president Mike Gansey, making the former NBA All-Star the No. 2 executive for the franchise, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Knights recover in 2OT, outlast Canes in Game 3
stories.summary: Defenseman Shea Theodore was credited with a goal in double overtime, and the Golden Knights recovered from losing a 4-0 lead to defeat the Carolina Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 3 of the Stanley Cup Final on Saturday, giving Vegas a 2-1 lead in the series.

stories.title: Serena on Queen's return: Have nothing to lose
stories.summary: Twenty-three-time Grand Slam singles champion Serena Williams is liberating herself of any expectations as she prepares to make her comeback at the HSBC Championships in London.

stories.title: McDavid ties Gretzky with 5th Ted Lindsay Award
stories.summary: Connor McDavid of the Oilers has won the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's most outstanding player as voted by his peers.

stories.title: Antonelli wins fifth straight F1 race in Monaco
stories.summary: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli has taken his fifth consecutive victory after a dominant drive at the Monaco Grand Prix, despite being hampered by a red flag in the closing stages.
